hero_motto: FROM THE COMMUNITY FOR THE COMMUNITY
intro_p1: CONVOYRAMA is a project born within the TruckersMP community. We created this space to offer a neutral place, open to all players and VTCs, where anyone can find tools to improve their game experience.
intro_p2: We are not a VTC; we are a community-driven HUB. If you have questions or want to collaborate, you can find dr.will on our central Discord server.
feature_pitstop_desc: Your quick technical stop for ATS and ETS2. Repair, refuel, and manage your cargo in seconds.
feature_lagdrive_desc: Direct mod synchronization. The fastest way to share files with your team.
feature_lagfm_desc: The official community radio. Enjoy the best music while you travel the routes.
feature_lagid_desc: A new step into roleplay. Verified identity and community economy. Coming soon.
feature_flyer_desc: Create professional invitations for your convoys and events automatically.
feature_tuppertruck_desc: Do you like your truck? Pack it! Convert your current configuration into a mod ready for the dealership.
footer_tagline: If the mod explodes or your truck comes to life, we weren't here.
ps_desc: PitStop is an essential utility for ATS and ETS2 drivers. Modify your saved game instantly to save time on maintenance tasks.
ps_note: Note: The application includes a small in-game overlay. Use Alt + 1 to refuel, repair, and remove cargo weight instantly on your last save. We recommend using F9 (quick save), pressing Alt + 1, and then F10 (load game).
ps_f1_desc: Repair your truck and trailer to 100% without looking for a workshop.
ps_f2_desc: Fill the tank in seconds and forget about gas station stops.
ps_f3_desc: Remove the weight from your current cargo for a lighter drive.
ps_f4_desc: Works with both American Truck Simulator and Euro Truck Simulator 2.
ld_desc: The ultimate solution for direct mod sharing. Connect with other drivers and keep your files updated instantly.
ld_alpha_desc: Version 0.2.1 is experimental. Report bugs on LAG'S SPEED Discord.
ld_f1_desc: Direct transfer between players using P2P.
ld_f2_desc: Keep your entire team on the same version of mods.
ld_f4_desc: You decide which folders to share and when to sync.
tt_tagline: "Pack your truck, buy it whenever you want"
tt_desc: Got a perfect truck? With TupperTruck you can capture its exact configuration from your ATS or ETS2 save game and convert it into a Standalone Mod (.scs).
tt_alpha_desc: TupperTruck is experimental. Keep in mind that the tupper seal might not be 100% airtight: some accessories might not copy correctly. Use at your own risk.
tt_disclaimer: Note: We are not responsible if your truck becomes self-aware after packaging, if it tries to eat other trucks' mods, or if the dealership looks at you weird for trying to buy a truck you already had.
tt_f1_desc: Captures all technical components directly from the save file.
tt_f2_desc: Generates an automatic .scs file for the official dealership.
tt_f3_desc: Do your friends want your exact same truck? Pass them the tupper and you're done.
tt_f4_desc: Works for both American Truck Simulator and Euro Truck Simulator 2.
ev_warning: v0.125 | This page may take a while to load.
ev_canvas_warning: Note: Map circles may appear displaced in the preview, but will show correctly in the downloaded image.
